BufferedWriter(Files.newBufferedWriter(indexPath, StandardOpenOption.APPEND));

+            writer.newLine();                                                  
+            writer.close();                                                    
+                                                                               
+            System.out.println("Checked out commit: " + commit);

This implementation adds checkout and reset commands that allow you to switch   
between commits. The checkout command will clear the index and working          
directory, while the reset command will also write the commit message to the    
log.
